title: filago gallica var. multicaulis
intro: Filago gallica var. multicaulis, also known as French clematis or multiflowered fleabane, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a mild diuretic and to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Filago gallica var. multicaulis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
